'''Cligot''' was a [[Yeoman/Legends|Yeoman]] onboard the ''[[Bloodprice]]'' in [[16 ABY/Legends|16 ABY]].

==Biography==
While onboard she was ''examined'' by her commanding officer, [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Ors Dogot]]. She was [[Death/Legends|killed]] along with the rest of the crew of the ''Bloodprice'' when it attacked the [[Teljkon Vagabond]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Shield of Lies]]'' {{1stm}}
